notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.

forbidden.title: Access Restricted
forbidden.description: The page you're trying to access is not available for you.

authRequired.title: Access Restricted
authRequired.description: The page you're trying to access is only available to registered users.
authRequired.descriptionContinued: Please sign in to continue. Don't have an account? Sign up for free.

genericError.title: Oops!
genericError.serverHint: Please check that your server ({{graphQLEndpoint}}) is available, and reload the page.
genericError.contactSupport: If the error persists please <contact>contact support</contact>.

messages.lazyLoad: Network error occurred. Please try reloading the page.
messages.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please try reloading the page.
